description: Luxury living without the luxury price tag. 2,188 sq. ft., 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, single story, 2-car garage. Designed with growing families in mind, this beautiful single-story home offers the perfect balance of comfort, style, and affordability. Why continue paying high rent when you could invest in a home that gives you space, stability, and elevated living? Step into custom-grade finishes, a thoughtfully designed layout, and a welcoming community filled with resort-style amenities and a friendly atmosphere you'll love coming home to. Affordable luxury meets everyday functionality in a home built for memories, entertaining, and your next chapter.
